node.data: {"M8076":{"lit":"ճանապարհին","context":"text/body/ab[38]","n":"ճանապարհին"},"M6712":{"lit":"ճանա<lb xml:id=\"l104399689\" facs=\"#z104399689\" n=\"3\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>պարհին","line":{"facs":"#z104399688","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104399688","n":"2"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-148b"},"n":"ճանապարհին"},"M9307":{"lit":"ճանապար<lb xml:id=\"l104221100\" facs=\"#z104221100\" n=\"14\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>հին","line":{"facs":"#z104221099","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104221099","n":"13"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9307-176b"},"n":"ճանապարհին"}}
